The server's `_remainder` buffer in `SMTPStream._write` grows without limit, leading to heap exhaustion, prolonged GC pauses that freeze the event loop, and in some cases, process crash.\n\nThe `_write` method in `lib/smtp-stream.js` appends incoming TCP chunks to `this._remainder` in command mode. The buffer is only emptied when a newline is found. If a client never sends a newline, the `_remainder` value will grow indefinitely, causing excess memory consumption.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00572, "percentile": 0.43502}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fv2f-rw9f-v9cm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-29T22:57:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv2f-rw9f-v9cm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fv2f-rw9f-v9cm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-38728"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T15:16:51Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T15:30:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-38728", "https://bytecreator.dev/blog/CVE-2026-38728", "https://github.com/nodemailer/smtp-server", "https://github.com/nodemailer/smtp-server/releases/tag/v3.18.3", "https://github.com/nodemailer/smtp-server/commit/592c5666fa0c76d1d04c1a32abad0ef806fbfe97", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv2f-rw9f-v9cm"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nodemailer/smtp-server", "summary": "smtp-server's command parser memory exhaustion denial-of-service", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-29T22:57:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv2f-rw9f-v9cm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.18.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "smtp-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.18.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: smtp-server's command parser memory exhaustion denial-of-service
